description: Capabilities explicitly rejected from the AutoMindLab enterprise runtime owner repo.

entries.name: BMO Telegram operator shell
entries.rollbackNotes: Keep this capability out of `automindlab-stack`. If similar functionality is needed, implement it in the owning downstream product instead.
entries.reviewNotes: Rejected because it would collapse runtime ownership into a consumer/operator shell and blur runtime vs product boundaries.
entries.enterpriseJustification: None for the enterprise runtime repo. The runtime should expose contracts, diagnostics, and policy, not own the consumer/operator UX surface.
entries.boundaryDecision: Do not import BMO local/operator UX into `automindlab-stack`. Keep it out or implement it downstream under the correct owner.
